name: Mule CloudHub 2.0 Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - dev

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:

    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Setup Java
      uses: actions/setup-java@v3
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Build Mule App
      run: mvn clean package

    - name: Deploy to CloudHub 2.0
      run: |
        mvn deploy -DmuleDeploy \
        -Danypoint.username=dharanipatteboyina@gmail.com\
        -Danypoint.password=Dharu@143job\
        -Denvironment=Sandbox
